issues.title: Summer 2026: Bodies, Borders & Bandwidth
issues.subtitle: Summer 2026: Bodies, Borders & Bandwidth
issues.description: A broadsheet exploring embodied computation, border surveillance art, and low-bandwidth community networks across Southeast Asia and Southern Europe.

issues.title: Global Media Art & Theory Trends (2026)
issues.subtitle: Global Media Art & Theory Trends (2026)
issues.description: A global broadsheet surveying new media art trends and festival schedules across Europe, the US, and East Asia (Japan, China, Hong Kong).
